## What's Changed

_This is sample content for local preview only. At release time the workflow
replaces it with GitHub's auto-generated notes for the actual version._

* Add per-profile Excel import/export for vitals, goals and medications by @Tokans in #42
* Scan & extract insurance cards into the encrypted document vault by @Tokans in #43
* Improve goal ETA projection from sparse readings by @Tokans in #45
* Bump Tauri to the latest 2.x by @Tokans in #46
